message:
bd-1566: Add ModelEvents trait for instance lifecycle hooks

Implements the ModelEvents trait with 8 lifecycle event methods:
- before_insert / after_insert
- before_update / after_update
- before_delete / after_delete
- on_load / on_refresh

All methods have default no-op implementations, allowing users to
selectively override only the events they need. Includes comprehensive
tests for both default and custom implementations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
